args: Audit the explicit-review routing path in the model-router extension for edge cases around review diversity and fallback behavior. Focus on cases where a review request could accidentally reuse the last implementation model, stay in the same model family when a distinct family is available, or lose the fallback explanation surfaced in status/debug output. If you find a real issue, implement the smallest robust fix, add lightweight regression coverage without new dependencies, and keep the visible status contract coherent. Update docs only if the user-visible routing contract changes.
